texto: I'm pretty much a good Catholic girl at heart and I believe in family. I also have a basic belief that God takes care of me. I believe in prayer, even though I'm not that religious. I just have that foundation from my family. I mean when you think that you're just a human being and one of God's creatures, you can't take anything that seriously.
explicacao: Citação de Catherine O'Hara sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “I'm pretty much a good Catholic girl at heart and I believe in family. I also have a basic belief…” articula reflexao, good, god em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como god e heart.

texto: I know. I'm lazy. But I made myself a New Years resolution that I would write myself something really special. Which means I have 'til December, right?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Catherine O'Hara que provoca temas ligados a autoestima. Ao questionar “I know. I'm lazy. But I made myself a New Years resolution that I would write myself something re…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre autoestima, myself, know, com foco em ano-novo e know.
